articles.author: Bharatha Mallawarachi, Sheikh Saaliq, Krishan Francis, Rod McGuirk
articles.title: Sri Lanka takes control of an Iranian vessel off its coast after US sank an Iranian warship - AP News
articles.description: Sri Lanka is bringing more than 200 sailors from an Iranian ship ashore after the vessel sought assistance near the Indian Ocean island nation. Sri Lankan President Anura Kumara Dissanayake said the country took control of the vessel after it reported an engi…
articles.content: COLOMBO, Sri Lanka (AP) Sri Lanka began transferring more than 200 sailors from an Iranian vessel to shore Friday after the ship sought assistance while anchored outside the countrys waters, as tensi… [+5739 chars]
